title: reel:edit-dialogue args
description: Add / update / remove a subtitle dialogue line (固定底栏电影字幕, DIA 轨) on a scene timeline. op='add' creates a line (text+startMs required; returns the new id). op='update' patches an existing line by id. op='remove' deletes by id. Call reel:get-scene-timeline first for ids. Times are ms relative to scene start.

id.description: Dialogue line id. Required for update/remove.

endMs.description: Disappear time (ms). Omit = until next line / scene end.
